svg.aria-label: Nautical chart of The Isle of Rahai, an island in a temperate climate.
svg.title: The Isle of Rahai
svg.desc: Nautical chart of The Isle of Rahai, an island in a temperate climate.
svg.metadata: Vellum chart. Recipe: seed=42 type=island band=temperate land=0.34 grid=320x240 style=nautical engine=0.1.0

g.text: Being a true & faithful chart of these waters, as surveyed
by Taiki the Wayfarer in the year 1059 of the Cedar Age
